name: Rostbraten Mit Pilzfulle (Beef Roast with Mushroom Stuffing)
recipeInstructions:
Grill the flank steak lightly seasoned with salt and pepper. Spread mustard on one side.
Prepare the mushroom stuffing by heating vegetable oil in a frying pan, adding onion and cooking for 3 minutes until browned. Add mushroom pieces and cook for 5 minutes. Stir in parsley, chives, tomato paste, bread crumbs, salt, pepper, and paprika. Spread the stuffing on the mustard side of the flank steak, roll it up like a jellyroll, and tie with string.
Prepare the gravy by cooking bacon in a Dutch oven until partially done. Add the meat roll and brown all sides for about 10 minutes. Add chopped onions and sauté for 5 minutes. Pour in beef broth, cover the Dutch oven, and simmer for 1 hour. Remove the meat to a preheated platter, season with mustard, salt, pepper, and catsup. Serve the gravy separately.
